siteProfile.name: Korean SaaS marketing site
siteProfile.brandNotes: Quiet B2B SaaS tone, Pretendard typography, dense but readable Korean product copy, indigo accent only for action and focus.
userFlows: Visitor compares pricing and starts signup
Existing customer finds feature proof before contacting sales

visual-design.notes: Hero hierarchy and CTA contrast need review before company pilot.
findings: Primary CTA competes with secondary link on the homepage

ux-flow.notes: Map visitor path from landing page to pricing and signup.

accessibility.notes: Keyboard and focus audit required for nav, pricing toggle, and forms.
findings: Focus state is not yet documented for the mobile menu

seo.notes: Inspect title, description, heading order, canonical, OG.

technical-quality.notes: Confirm component reuse before editing target repo.

runtime-issues.notes: Open console/network once preview deploy is available.

content-quality.notes: Copy should lead with proof and reduce generic SaaS phrasing.
findings: Pricing page does not explain plan fit in the first viewport

refactorTasks.title: Clarify homepage CTA hierarchy
refactorTasks.problem: Primary and secondary actions compete in the hero, which weakens the visitor's first decision.
refactorTasks.evidence: Sample finding: Primary CTA competes with secondary link on the homepage.
refactorTasks.codexPrompt: Inspect the target homepage implementation, preserve existing design system patterns, and revise the hero CTA hierarchy so the primary signup action is visually dominant while the secondary action remains available.
verification: Confirm focus indicators and text contrast
risks: Could change conversion copy without stakeholder approval

remainingRisks: MCP readiness gaps may limit verification depth.
Copy or brand changes may require stakeholder review.
Automated performance/accessibility tooling is outside this MVP unless run in the target repo.

reportNotes: MVP audit is a planning console. Run the generated prompts inside the target website repo before marking implementation complete.
